name: @shopify/quick
description: Quickly deploy static sites internally. For Shopifolk only! ⚡

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && esbuild index.js bin/quick.js src/vite-plugin.js --bundle --outdir=dist --entry-names=[name] --platform=node --format=cjs --external:fsevents && esbuild src/sdk.js --bundle --outfile=dist/sdk.js --platform=node --format=cjs && esbuild src/sdk.js --bundle --outfile=dist/sdk.mjs --platform=node --format=esm --banner:js="import{createRequire}from'module';const require=createRequire(import.meta.url);" && cp src/quick-dev-sw.js dist/

author: Shopify
